title: [DNM] test new ocicrypt pre-release v1.1.0
body:
Testing compatibility of consumers before release. Just testing to make sure CI is passing. Probably need an /ok-to-test.

Signed-off-by: Brandon Lum <lumjjb@gmail.com>
